title: Team
description: A club or national team that wears jerseys. One file per team under data/teams/<sport>/<league|national>/<slug>.yaml

slug.description: Stable identifier, must equal the file name (without .yaml).

name.description: Canonical display name, e.g. 'FC Bayern München'.

league.description: League slug (e.g. 'bundesliga', 'nba', 'nfl', 'nhl'). null for national teams.

aliases.description: Spelling variants used by shops/feeds. Drives the consumer's name normalization.

wikidata.description: Wikidata item id (e.g. 'Q15789'), enables idempotent re-imports.

logo_url.description: Reference URL only — this database stores no image binaries.
